level_signals: 4+ years of Revenue Operations at high-growth technology companies
Serves as trusted partner to leadership
Leads design and management of dashboards, reports, and KPIs

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 4+ years of Revenue Operations at high-growth technology companies
Proven track record of developing and implementing end-to-end solutions, from data collection and analysis to execution.
Can break complex problems into smaller, actionable solution steps
Strong analytical skills, with proven expertise in SQL and data visualization using BI tools (e.g. Sigma)
Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams.
Highly adaptable, with a proactive approach to problem-solving and process improvement.
Strong coachability and willingness to learn and adapt to new challenges.

scope.surface: Lead Generation / GTM Strategy & Operations within the Revenue Operations team, covering pre-sales functions
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS / AI platform (enterprise and SMB customers)
core_responsibilities: Build and maintain strategic automations and standardized processes that support cross-functional teams and promote consistency and adoption.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Marketing, Events, Partner) to drive initiatives that enhance revenue generation and operational effectiveness.
Serve as a trusted partner to leadership, providing strategic insights, actionable recommendations, and performance reporting.
Develop and test new ideas, workflows, and sources that improve critical levers within each functional area.

Oversee analytics and performance analyses across pre-sales functions. Identify areas of opportunity and acceleration; build dashboards and insights that inform experimentation and guide lever improvement.
Lead the design and management of dashboards, reports, and key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure and enhance team performance.

green_flags: Company is well-funded ($781M raised, $11B valuation) with notable enterprise clients and investors
Remote-first with truly global team and flexible location policy
Clear role scope within Revenue Operations / GTM Strategy team
Explicit collaboration partners and functional area (pre-sales) described
Annual learning & development stipend and social travel stipend offered
Company has co-working stipend for those not near main hubs
red_flags: No job titles mentioned as company policy — may make leveling and career progression opaque
Role title says 'Lead Generation Strategy and Operations' but body describes broad Revenue/GTM Ops — could be a scope mismatch worth clarifying
